results.title: New Zealand issues tsunami warning after 5.9 magnitude earthquake strikes off South Island coast
results.description: The National Emergency Management Agency said that the advisory had been downgraded from a warning after it was determined that the earthquake was less intense than initially estimated, the news agency AFP reported.

results.title: Uttar Pradesh: Azam Khan’s Jauhar University given 15-day deadline to demolish 38 out of 40 buildings on the campus
results.description: The Rampur Development Authority has given a 15-day ultimatum to Azam Khan’s Jauhar University to demolish 38 campus buildings constructed without approved plans.

results.title: BLA claims 48 attacks in 15 days across Balochistan, says 40+ Pakistani soldiers killed
results.description: BLA claimed 48 attacks across Balochistan from July 1-14, alleging 40+ Pakistani security personnel killed. Targets included military convoys, checkpoints, bridges, and highways in Mastung, Nushki, Kech, Khuzdar, Ziarat & others. BLA also lost 5 fighters. Group vowed to continue armed campaign again

results.title: Gajapati Maharaja Reaches Nandighosha Chariot to Perform Chera Pahanra
results.description: #ପ ାଲିଙ୍କିରେ_ଯାଉଥିଲେ_ଗଜପତି_ହଠାତ୍‌..... ଦେବୀ ସୁଭଦ୍ରା ଓ ପ୍ରଭୁ ବଳଭଦ୍ରଙ୍କ ରଥରେ ଛେରା ପହଁରା ପରେ ଏବେ ମହାପ୍ରଭୁ କାଳିଆ ଠାକୁରଙ୍କ ନନ୍ଦିଘୋଷ ରଥରେ ଛେରା ପହଁରା ଆରମ୍ଭ ହେବ। ସେଥିପାଇଁ ନନ୍ଦିଘୋଷ ରଥରେ ବିରାଜମାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଗଜପତି ମହାରାଜ। After completing the sacred Chera Pahanra ritual on the chariots of Goddess Subhadra and Lord Balabhadra, the Gajapati Maharaja has now proceeded to Lord Jagannath's Nandighosha chariot during the world-famous Rath Yatra in Puri. Arriving in the traditional palanquin, the Gajapati Maharaja has taken his place on the Nandighosha chariot to perform the final phase of the revered ritual before lakhs of devotees. #JagannathRathYatra #Nandighosha #CheraPahanra #GajapatiMaharaja #LordJagannath #PuriRathYatra #RathYatra2026 #Odisha #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel.
